arts.ttl: Milan Close to Securing Gimenez: New Offer Prepared for Feyenoord
arts.sum: AC Milan are ramping up their efforts to sign Santiago Gimenez, with negotiations reaching a crucial stage. The Rossoneri have already reached a preliminary agreement with the Mexican striker, offering a three-year contract with an option for an additional season. According to Calciomercato, the proposed salary package amounts to €2.5 million per season plus bonuses. The post Milan Close to Securing Gimenez: New Offer Prepared for Feyenoord appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Serie A | AC Milan v Parma: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: As AC Milan prepare for a crucial week ahead, Sergio Conceicao may consider rotating his squad for Sunday’s match against Parma. The Rossoneri face a pivotal Champions League fixture followed by the highly anticipated Derby della Madonnina against Inter. Conceicao’s options have been bolstered by the return of Christian Pulisic, who made a brief appearance against Girona after recovering from injury. Samuel Chukwueze could also be available for selection for the first time since December, while Fikayo Tomori returns after serving a one-match UEFA suspension. However, Milan will be without several key players. Emerson Royal, Malick Thiaw, and Ruben Loftus-Cheek The post Serie A | AC Milan v Parma: Probable starting lineups appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: AC Milan and Parma aiming to bounce back
arts.sum: After a run of three consecutive defeats, Parma have since lost only one of their last four Serie A games (W1 D2), earning the same points tally as Milan in that period (5), but while recording a better goal difference than the Rossoneri (0 for the Ducali, -1 for the Diavolo ). Milan (50) and Parma (42) are the two sides that have recorded the most direct attacks in Serie A this season (open play sequences that starts just inside the team’s own half and has at least 50% of movement towards the opposition’s goal and ends in a shot or a touch in the opposition box) and are also the two teams that have recorded the most shots following a fast break in the Italian top-flight this season (27 for the Gialloblù, 26 for the Rossoneri).

arts.ttl: Good news for Christian Pulisic on eve of crucial Champions League tie
arts.sum: Christian Pulisic, widely celebrated as “Captain America,” is set to return to AC Milan’s starting lineup in Serie A under head coach Sergio Conceição this Sunday against Parma. His brief appearance during the final 15 minutes of Milan’s Champions League win over Girona earlier this week offered a promising sign of his recovery, paving the way for his return to a pivotal role with the Rossoneri.
